zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de Roeulx於1204年出生在比利時海瑙特洛利時，她的父親Seigneur Eustace III de Roeulx40歲，母親Marie De Mortagne Tournai19歲。她於1234年與Jacques de Condé結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1257年9月30日在比利時海瑙特貝洛爾享年53歲，埋葬在比利時海瑙特貝洛爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de Roeulx于1204年出生在比利时海瑙特洛利时，她的父亲Seigneur Eustace III de Roeulx40岁，母亲Marie De Mortagne Tournai19岁。她于1234年与Jacques de Condé结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1257年9月30日在比利时海瑙特貝洛爾享年53岁，埋葬在比利时海瑙特貝洛爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de Roeulx was born in 1204, in Roeulx, Hainaut, Belgium, her father, Seigneur Eustace III de Roeulx, was 40 and her mother, Marie De Mortagne Tournai, was 19. She married Jacques de Condé in 1234. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 30 September 1257, in Beloeil, Hainaut, Belgium, at the age of 53, and was buried in Beloeil, Hainaut, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de Roeulx est née en 1204, à Roeulx, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Seigneur Eustace III de Roeulx, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Marie De Mortagne Tournai, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Jacques de Condé en 1234. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 septembre 1257, à Beloeil, Hainaut, Belgique, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Beloeil, Hainaut, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de Roeulx 1204 in Roeulx, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Seigneur Eustace III de Roeulx 40 und ihre Mutter Marie De Mortagne Tournai 19. Sie hat 1234 Jacques de Condé geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. September 1257 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Beloeil, Hennegau, Belgien und wurde in Beloeil, Hennegau, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Roeulx è nata il nel 1204 nel Roeulx, Hainaut, Belgio, sua padre, Seigneur Eustace III de Roeulx, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Marie De Mortagne Tournai, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Jacques de Condé nel 1234. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 30 settembre 1257, nel Beloeil, Hainaut, Belgio, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Beloeil, Hainaut, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de Roeulxが1204年にベルギーヘイナトローウルックスで生まれた時，父Seigneur Eustace III de Roeulxは40歳，母Marie De Mortagne Tournaiは19歳であった。1234年にJacques de Condéと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1257年9月30日にベルギーヘイナトベロエイルで53歳で死去し，ベルギーヘイナトベロエイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Roeulx(이)가 1204년 벨기에 하인오트 로우에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Seigneur Eustace III de Roeulx(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie De Mortagne Tournai(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1234년 Jacques de Condé(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1257년 9월 30일 벨기에 하인오트 브로일에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 하인오트 브로일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Roeulx nasceu em 1204, em Roeulx, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Seigneur Eustace III de Roeulx, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Marie De Mortagne Tournai, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Jacques de Condé em 1234. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1257, em Beloeil, Hainaut, Bélgica, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Beloeil, Hainaut, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de Roeulx родилась в 1204 г. в местности роеулкс, ханаут, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Seigneur Eustace III de Roeulx было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie De Mortagne Tournai, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jacques de Condé в 1234 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 30 сентября 1257 г. в местности белоил, ханаут, Бельгия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности белоил, ханаут, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de Roeulx nació en 1204, en Roeulx, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Seigneur Eustace III de Roeulx, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Marie De Mortagne Tournai, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Jacques de Condé en 1234. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de septiembre de 1257, en Beloeil, Hainaut, Bélgica, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Beloeil, Hainaut, Bélgica.
